sections.value: THIS CONFIDENTIALITY AND NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT is made this ______ day of ________ 20___

Jax Nig. limited, a Company incorporated under the companies and allied matters act 2020, and having its registered address at suite 12, crescent mall, maitama, abuja. (hereinafter referred to  as “DISCLOSER”),

A & O limited, a company incorporated under the companies and allied matters act 2020, and having its registered address at bno. 3 brass road, old G.R.A, Port-harcourt  (hereinafter referred to as “RECIPIENT”, which expression shall where the context so admits include its affiliated companies).

value:
a. The DISCLOSER is interested in engaging the services of the RECIPIENT as an electronic transporter to the DISCLOSER, concerning its business, of transporting electronic devices and technological equipment, to the DISCLOSER's offices in nigeria .

b. In order to evaluate and advise the DISCLOSER on its business activities, RECIPIENT believes it needs to receive and analyze certain confidential and proprietary information of DISCLOSER including, legal, technical, financial, regulatory, operational and other information concerning the DISCLOSER, and its business.

c. the DISCLOSER is willing to make such information available to RECIPIENT on a confidential basis, only for the purpose of analysis in connection with the Business Purpose and subject to the confidentiality and non-disclosure provisions, terms and conditions set forth in this Agreement.

sections.value: NOW THEREFORE, in consideration of the mutual covenants and agreements contained herein, DISCLOSER and RECIPIENT agree as follows;

value:
The RECIPIENT acknowledges and agrees that all information made available by DISCLOSER to RECIPIENT in connection with the Business Purpose regardless of the manner in which it has been furnished, including, without limitation, any and all financial information, technical data, customer lists, sales, marketing and business plans, operating procedures, personnel data and agreements, whether or not such information is oral and if orally disclosed, subsequently confirmed as confidential in writing, written, printed, contained on computer disc or otherwise represented, is the confidential and proprietary information of DISCLOSER
1. details about the goods.
2. delivery route and logistics plans
3. pricing and contract terms.
4. tracking and shipment data.
5. security arrangements.

The term Confidential Information as used herein also includes;

a. the fact that the Parties may be or are engaged in discussions regarding the Business Purpose and any proposed terms or conditions of or relating to the proposed Business Purpose; and

b. any and all analyses, compilations, studies or other documents or records prepared by RECIPIENT or any of RECIPIENT’s employees, representatives, agents or advisors that contain or otherwise reflect or are generated from Confidential Information.

The RECIPIENT shall hold in strict confidence the Confidential Information, and the RECIPIENT shall not, directly or indirectly,

a. use or permit the use of any of the Confidential Information for, or in connection with, any business of the RECIPIENT, or by any other person whatsoever, or for any purpose other than the analysis of the Business Purpose contemplated herein, or

disclose or permit the disclosure of any of the Confidential Information to any person or entity other than the RECIPIENT’s employees, representatives or agents, including without limitation, its financial, legal or other professional advisors, whose knowledge of the proposed Business Purpose and access to the Confidential Information is required to perform their duties in connection with the analysis of the proposed Business Purpose and who agree to comply with the confidentiality, non-disclosure and non-use provisions of this Agreement.

sections.value: 3. DISCLOSURE, APPLICATION AND USE OF CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION

value: RECIPIENT shall hold the Confidential Information in confidence and shall disclose the Confidential Information only to its employees, agents and advisors who have a need to know to evaluate and accomplish the Business Purpose, and who have agreed in writing to be bound by the terms and conditions of this Agreement.
RECIPIENT will not utilize, employ, exploit or in any other manner whatsoever use the Confidential Information other than for the Business Purpose without the prior written consent of DISCLOSER.

The DISCLOSER may give notice in writing at any time requiring that any part of the Confidential Information disclosed pursuant to this Confidentiality Agreement and any copies thereof be either returned or destroyed, such return or destruction to be combined with a notice to the DISCLOSER to the effect that upon such return or destruction the RECIPIENT has not knowingly retained in its possession or under its control, either directly or indirectly, any Confidential Information or copies thereof, and the RECIPIENT must comply with any such request within twenty-one (21) days of receipt of such request, except to the extent the RECIPIENT is advised by its legal counsel that complying with such notice would be prohibited by law.  In case of the latter, the RECIPIENT will, in writing, identify the subject Confidential Information and notify the DISCLOSER of the legal reason for non-compliance.

RECIPIENT agrees to use at least the same degree of care to protect the Confidential Information as RECIPIENT uses to protect its own confidential information; provided that, without in any way limiting any other obligation or liability of RECIPIENT under this Agreement, RECIPIENT shall take all appropriate action to prevent the unauthorized use or disclosure of the proposed Business Purpose and the Confidential Information and shall take all reasonable precautions to protect and maintain the confidentiality of the Confidential Information.

Confidential Information delivered orally by DISCLOSER shall be put in writing and transmitted by the DISCLOSER to RECIPIENT within twenty-one [21] days of its oral delivery.  Delivery shall be in accordance with the notice provisions of this Agreement.

sections.value: Any amendment to this Agreement must be executed in writing by both parties.

value:
This agreement is governed by, and will be construed in accordance with the laws of the Federal Republic of Nigeria.

The Parties submit to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of the Federal Republic of Nigeria in relation to any legal actions or proceedings arising out of or in connection with this agreement.

Process by which any proceedings are begun in Nigeria may be served on any Party by being delivered to the address herein of that Party.

Damages would not be an adequate remedy for any breach of this Agreement and the Parties shall be entitled to resort to such equitable remedies as are permitted under the laws of Nigeria for any threatened or actual breach of this Agreement and no proof of special damages shall be necessary for the enforcement of this Agreement.

sections.value: Any dispute arising out of this contract, between the parties and the partnership , shall be submitted to an arbitration panel in nigeria, and in accordance with the Arbitration and Mediation Act 2024, or any other re-enactment, modification, or extension of such Act.
IN WITNESS OF WHICH the parties have execute this agreement, by their authorised reprensatatives, in the manner below the day and year first above written.

value: THE COMMON SEAL OF JAX Nig. LIMITED AS PER A RESOLUTION HELD ON 20TH JANUARY, 2025, IS AFFIXED TO THIS DEED AND DELIVERED
THE COMMON SEAL OF A & O LIMITED AS PER A RESOLUTION HELD ON 20TH JANUARY, 2025, IS AFFIXED TO THIS DEED AND DELIVERED
